title: Fyakulangulula
description: Ifintu ifya wholesale ifyaliko amaprices ya tiers na minimum order quantities.
results: {count, plural, one {# listing ya wholesale} other {# listings sha wholesale}}

t2Notice.title: Bashitisha aba T2 verified fye
t2Notice.body: Fyakulangulula fya wholesale pa Vergeo5 fyalembwa na mabushiness ya T2-verified. Abashitisha ba retail fye tabangapo listings sha tier pricing.

empty.title: Takuli listings sha wholesale pano
empty.body: Bwelako limbi — abashipilisha aba verified balelengapo stock ya bulk na tier pricing.

gate.title: Business mode ilefwailwa
gate.body: Fyakulangulula fya wholesale na tier pricing fyaliikilwa ku mabushiness ya verified. Enable business mode ukulolesha no kushita mu bulk.
gate.signInBody: Ingilani na account ya business iya verified ukumona fyakulangulula fya wholesale.
gate.pendingBody: Tulolesha ifyakulanda fyenu fya business. Mukapoka wholesale access nga mwa verified.
gate.rejectedBody: Tatwakwanisha ukuverify business yenu. Update ifyakulanda no kutuma again ukufungula wholesale.
